title: easyTeams
description: Teaming up with your Friends has never been easier!
body:
![IMage displaying easyTeams logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c43fb4d207ea9d5b96f3c399864a7018ce46cfb.png)

## Team up with your Friends!
A Survival-Friendly Datapack/Mod that makes playing in **Teams** with your Friends super easy

There are a whopping 15 Teams included, meaning one Team for every Non-White Dye in the game.

## Why join a Team?
- Your Name will have the Teams Color
- Friendly Fire is disabled (You won't accidentally hit your Teammates in group fights)
- Your Death Messages and your Nametag will only be visible for Team Members
- Chat with team members by using /teammsg

## How to join a Team
To join a Team, simply put a Wooden Sword and an according Dye (Red, Blue Green, Yellow, Pink, Orange etc.) in the crafting Grid and click on the Dye in the output box. You will automatically join the Team with the color of the Dye!

![An Image displaying how to join the Red Team inside the Crafting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1dbZPSR7/images/2c858b6c2d9aef345af639a5011276b94619f6e6.png)

## I don't like my Team!
To leave your Team, use White Dye instead :( You don't need to leave your Team to switch Teams.  
![An Image displaying how to leave your Team inside the Crafting Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1dbZPSR7/images/ffaed72b41f2f2a8d48244ce51415e65bab6d4b6.png)

## 🛠️ Installation

### Datapack Installation Guide
Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world.

### Mod installation Guide
Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides.

## ❗Issues & Suggestions
If you encounter any Issues with this Datapack/Mod, please report them on [my Discord](https://discord.gg/R2G6EMW42H)
